name: Blessing Ihejirika
message: Big Quams Media literally changed my life. I used the CBT practice tool every day for 3 months and scored 287 in JAMB. The scholarship section also helped me find funding I never knew existed. 100% free and 100% helpful!

name: Yusuf Abdullahi
message: The Post-UTME calculator is accurate and very easy to use. I calculated my aggregate for ABU and it matched exactly what the school portal showed. The subject combination checker also saved me from making a big mistake with my course selection.

name: Adaeze Nnaji
message: I downloaded 4 free textbooks from the eLibrary and they were all exactly what I needed for my Post-UTME prep. No registration, no payment — just download. I wish I had known about this platform earlier!

name: Hassan Musa
message: The NELFUND student loan guide on BQM was so clear and detailed. I followed every step and my loan was approved in less than a month. Very trustworthy platform — I recommend it to every Nigerian student.
